---
title: "CLI Reference"
---

This page is a quick command index for `qp`.

## Global Invocation

```text
qp [--no-color] [<task>] [task-args...]
```

Top-level flags:

- `--version`
- `--no-color`

## Core Task Execution

### Run task by name (or alias)

```bash
qp check
qp b --target api
```

Common task flags:

- `--json`
- `--dry-run`
- `--verbose`
- `--quiet`
- `--no-cache`
- `--allow-unsafe`
- `--events`
- `--var name=value`
- `--profile name`

### Explicit run command

```bash
qp run check --json
```

## Discovery and Help

```bash
qp list
qp list --json
qp help
qp help check
qp help quality
```

## Validation and Config

```bash
qp validate
qp validate --json
qp validate --suggest
```

```bash
qp scope cli
qp scope cli --json
qp scope cli --format prompt
qp scope --coverage --json
```

## Planning and Context

```bash
qp plan --file cmd/qp/main.go
qp plan --json --file internal/runner/runner.go
qp diff-plan
qp diff-plan --json
```

```bash
qp context
qp context --agent --task check
qp context --about "release flow"
qp context --json --about "architecture"
```

```bash
qp agent-brief --task check
qp agent-brief --diff --max-tokens 2500
qp agent-brief --json --file internal/config/config.go
```

## Guard and Repair

```bash
qp guard
qp guard ci --json
qp guard ci --events
```

```bash
qp repair
qp repair ci --brief
qp repair ci --json
qp repair ci --copy
```

## Architecture and Explain

```bash
qp arch-check
qp arch-check --json
```

```bash
qp explain check
qp explain internal/runner
qp explain guard --json
```

## Caching

```bash
qp cache status
qp cache status --json
qp cache clean
qp cache clean --all --json
```

## Init and Docs

```bash
qp init
qp init --from-repo --docs --codemap
qp docs
qp docs --list
qp docs user-guide
```

## Watch

```bash
qp watch check
qp watch guard:ci --path internal --path cmd
qp watch check --allow-unsafe
```

## Completion

```bash
qp completion bash
qp completion install
qp completion install --shell zsh
```

## Daemon and Setup

```bash
qp daemon start
qp daemon status
qp daemon restart
qp daemon stop
qp setup --windows
```

## Version

```bash
qp version
qp version --json
qp --version
```

## Next Step

For scenario-driven applied patterns, continue to the [Cookbook](cookbook/index.qmd).
